title: Swift Steamed Middle Eastern Lamb Kebabs
description: A quick and flavorful Middle Eastern dish featuring lamb kebabs steamed to perfection with herbal notes and a hint of balsamic vinegar, this recipe is FODMAP friendly and utilizes an ice bath for food safety.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together balsamic vinegar, olive oil, garlic free herb blend, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in a bamboo steamer lined with parchment paper.
Steam the lamb kebabs over boiling water for 8 minutes, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Immediately submerge the steamed kebabs in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Once the kebabs have cooled, brush them with lemon juice and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the lamb kebabs hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
